text:
After 5 straight World Cup mentions losses, we have officially made a profit on one game

The tide is turning https://t.co/zeZJKQREsY
TRUMP FAITH AND FREEDOM CONFERENCE https://t.co/VagLSgd7k1
Are these delays going to become common place for any new AI releases? Will Gemini's new model have the same fate next month?

Trump returns to the Washington Hilton today for a speech at the Faith & Freedom Coalition Conference

He has spoken at this conference numerous times going back as early as his first term campaign in 2016 https://t.co/PmpXiksPfl

USA absolutely DOMINATED Türkiye analytically and we didn’t even have our starters in

Bosnia doesn’t stand a chance

The people saying this game doesn’t matter to USA don’t know ball

It’s about pride

It’s about power

We stay hungry

We devour https://t.co/vl6aQibFkb

TRUMP TELE-RALLY AND ROSE GARDEN REMARKS https://t.co/tulRlBx7MC

Never been more ready for a USA game in MY LIFE

Last week I could only name Pulisic, now I also know Balogun and McKennie https://t.co/ZnsNCyD4mo
After sitting out world cup announcer mentions so far and experiencing significant FOMO - I finally put in the time to research them and hopefully start playing today

Another day with 2 Trump events and 6 World Cup games

1st a live tele-rally for Louisiana Congresswomen followed by Rose Garden remarks to farmers & ranchers visiting the White House https://t.co/IG5RBjzmQz

Win some lose some

Initially felt good not having a ton of expensive YES shares on the rally given it ended up being so short, but ended up losing anyway on the unexpected 'Gulf of America' mention https://t.co/WynD3KWOAW
TRUMP RALLY TO END ALL RALLIES https://t.co/rjZ1wIvAcX
Starting to think this guy might say "hottest" at his rally tonight
Great panel to watch
I personally think it was a brilliant decision by Trump to cancel the signing https://t.co/byeK4RTZNh

BIG DAY for Trump Mentions

Wonder how long the America is Back Rally will be, you have to think its got potential to go over 2 hours https://t.co/UzGQB0tEjA
MAMDANI SWEEP

25% Chance Mamdani-Endorsed candidates sweep in tonight's NYC primaries

Chevalier is the longest shot to complete the trifecta at just 27%

Should be an interesting market to watch as results come in (and potentially arb) against the main markets https://t.co/FvbgYCuEqc
